composition_pattern: draft-cleanup -> public-boundary-redaction -> section-reorder -> toc-generation -> table-normalization -> action-register -> appendix-release -> header-footer-pagination -> highlight-open-exception
user_task_description: A draft incident response Word manual must be converted into a public release manual through a long ordered workflow.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove draft/internal material; create a real TOC; reorder and rename sections; normalize timeline, communication, exception, action, evidence, and approval tables; insert required page breaks; update header/footer; highlight the unresolved MFA evidence exception; preserve only public-safe content.
atomic_scope: Single-document long-flow Word publication workflow with ordered section, table, TOC, privacy-boundary, and formatting operations.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx artifact saved to the required output path.

inspired_by.title: Word long-document TOC, section break, and header/footer publication pain
